channel.title: Friends on Ted Regis Site
channel.description: Recent content in Friends on Ted Regis Site

item.title: My Cool friends
item.description: Introduction Hi everyone, during my little journey in Infosec i meet awesome guys who help me, learn me and with i work when we have time. Roland Hack : A young and incredible Bug Hunter, web lovers, and it’s also pop a vuln after a cup of coffee with milk. Top0n3 : Also Bug hunter at Hackerone, pwner and reverser, he break mobile and web application. Hadrien : A incredible pentester guys, but it’s technically impacting, bug hunter coming soon.
